case_title: NICHOLAS SABELLA VS. HOUSE OF AIR et al

docket_entries.description: JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT HOUSE OF AIR
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR AUG-12-2013. JUL-17-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-17-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. THE JUN-18-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR RALPH WELLS ROBINSON APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-23-2013 THROUGH NOV-21-2013.
